full_text:
Lady Kai
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Kai. Sent to split Li Jue and Guo Si up, she spread rumours that Guo Si was having an affair. Lady Kai may not have existed in history. Lady Kai was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
